title: Genistella lasiantha
taxonomy: Genistella lasiantha is classified within the family Fabaceae. This plant is further classified as a member of the tribe Genisteae. The genus Genistella is often grouped under the subgenus Genistella or within the genus Genista. However, some classifications may consider Genistella as a synonym of Genista. The specific classification may vary depending on the source or the most recent updates.
uses: Genistella lasiantha has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
